# Docs_Model_Docs

> `@api`

Docs_Model_Docs ‚Äî the zero-config, multi-source documentation engine.

There is NO manifest. A COLLECTION is just "a directory of doc files" (+ an `_index.md`), and
those directories come from two kinds of source, aggregated automatically:

  1. PLATFORM content ‚Äî each subfolder of the module's content/<locale>/ dir (Guide, CMS, ‚Ä¶).
  2. MODULE docs ‚Äî each ACTIVE module that ships a `<module>/docs/<locale>/` folder becomes its
     own collection (slug = module name). Self-documenting modules: drop a docs/ folder and it
     appears; deactivate the module and it's gone. (Toggle with `docs.modules.scan`.)

Every file self-describes in a leading HTML comment (invisible when rendered):

  <!-- tiger:doc
  parent:     getting-started   # id of the parent node ‚Üí arbitrary-depth tree
  order:      20                # float among siblings; 5.22 slots between 5 and 6; first | last
  title:      Your first module # optional; else the first # H1, then the humanized id
  header:     true              # optional; a label-only node (no page)
  visibility: public            # public (default) | admin ‚Äî which SURFACE it shows on
  -->

VISIBILITY splits one engine into two surfaces: the public site (`/docs`, guests) shows
`public` docs; the in-admin help center shows `admin` docs (how to operate a module). A file's
visibility defaults to its collection's `_index` visibility, which defaults to `public`.

Everything is fronted by Docs_Model_Index ‚Äî a per-server, fingerprint-invalidated build cache
that spans all source dirs (see that class). DB docs remain the resolve-time override tier.

## Methods

### `__construct()`

Resolve the module's content/ directory for the multi-source scan.

### `rebuildIndex($locale = 'en')`

Force a rebuild of this server's cached index (admin "Rebuild index" / deploy warm).

- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale to rebuild

**Returns** `array` ‚Äî the freshly built index payload

### `collections($locale = 'en', $visibility = self::VIS_PUBLIC)`

Collections visible on a surface, sorted: [ ['slug','title','order','vis'], ‚Ä¶ ].

- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale
- `$visibility` `string` ‚Äî the target surface (public|admin)

**Returns** `array` ‚Äî the visible collections, ordered

### `collectionSlugs($locale = 'en', $visibility = self::VIS_PUBLIC)`

Collection slugs visible on a surface (for the controller's URL split).

- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale
- `$visibility` `string` ‚Äî the target surface (public|admin)

**Returns** `array` ‚Äî the visible collection slugs

### `tree($locale = 'en', $collection = self::DEFAULT_COLLECTION, $base = '/docs', $visibility = self::VIS_PUBLIC, $default = self::DEFAULT_COLLECTION)`

The nested nav tree for a collection on a surface ‚Äî visibility-filtered + url-stamped. $default is the prefix-less collection ('guide' public, '' admin ‚Üí everything namespaced).

- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale
- `$collection` `string` ‚Äî the collection slug to build the tree for
- `$base` `string` ‚Äî the base path each node URL is stamped under
- `$visibility` `string` ‚Äî the target surface (public|admin)
- `$default` `string` ‚Äî the prefix-less collection slug

**Returns** `array` ‚Äî the nested, url-stamped nav tree

### `resolve($slug, $locale = 'en', $orgId = '', $collection = self::DEFAULT_COLLECTION, $visibility = self::VIS_PUBLIC)`

Resolve a doc ‚Üí normalized array or null (‚Üí 404): ['slug','collection','title','html','headings','format','visibility','source'] A page whose visibility doesn't match the requesting surface returns null (a public URL can't serve an admin doc, and vice-versa). Empty slug = the collection's _index (landing).

- `$slug` `string` ‚Äî the URL slug (may be nested; empty = the collection landing)
- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale
- `$orgId` `string` ‚Äî the tenant/org id for the DB override tier
- `$collection` `string` ‚Äî the collection slug
- `$visibility` `string` ‚Äî the requesting surface (public|admin)

**Returns** `?array` ‚Äî the normalized doc array, or null (‚Üí 404)

### `search($q, $locale = 'en', $visibility = self::VIS_PUBLIC, $limit = 8)`

Search a surface's docs. Ranked hits: [ ['slug','collection','title','section','snippet','score'], ‚Ä¶ ].

- `$q` `string` ‚Äî the search query
- `$locale` `string` ‚Äî the content locale
- `$visibility` `string` ‚Äî the target surface (public|admin)
- `$limit` `int` ‚Äî the maximum number of hits to return

**Returns** `array` ‚Äî the ranked hits
